// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using ZeroAlloc.Flux;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Flux.Generated;

internal sealed class FluxDispatcher : IDispatcher
{
    private readonly IServiceProvider _sp;

    public FluxDispatcher(IServiceProvider sp)
    {
        _sp = sp;
    }

    public ValueTask DispatchAsync(global::Sample.PingAction action)
    {
        return Fan(_sp, action);

        static async ValueTask Fan(IServiceProvider sp, global::Sample.PingAction action)
        {
            var store_CounterState = (Store_Sample_CounterState)sp.GetRequiredService<IStore<global::Sample.CounterState>>();
            var newstore_CounterState = global::Sample.CounterReducers.On(store_CounterState.Value, action);
            await store_CounterState.UpdateAsync(newstore_CounterState).ConfigureAwait(false);
            var store_AuditState = (Store_Sample_AuditState)sp.GetRequiredService<IStore<global::Sample.AuditState>>();
            var newstore_AuditState = global::Sample.AuditReducers.On(store_AuditState.Value, action);
            await store_AuditState.UpdateAsync(newstore_AuditState).ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
    }

    public ValueTask DispatchAsync<TAction>(TAction action)
    {
        if (typeof(TAction) == typeof(global::Sample.PingAction))
        {
            return DispatchAsync(Unsafe.As<TAction, global::Sample.PingAction>(ref action));
        }
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }
}
